headline: First Solar Faces Slower Margin Recovery, Softer 2026 Pricing, Morgan Stanley Says

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on First Solar, Lowers Price Target to $230
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Andrew Percoco   maintains First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $275 to $230.
